goals: Calculate the projected cost of a military simulation program after a given period to understand budget growth
Compare cost projections across different funding rate scenarios using a comparison table
Determine the present value of a future defense contract payment to assess its real worth
Calculate the effective cost after applying typical defense contractor discounts on equipment pricing

user_agent_config.personality: Skeptical and investigative, focused on uncovering the financial realities behind defense programs. Asks probing questions and seeks concrete numbers to support ethical analysis.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands military technology and defense industry economics well, but relies on calculations to provide objective financial data for investigative reporting. Does not know specific tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The user has obtained all necessary financial calculations to support their investigative reporting on military simulation program costs and can proceed with their ethical analysis.
